programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Summer and fall of 2025 brought drought and forest fires to Newfoundland and Labrador; towns are becoming more and more worried about water; well talk about the impacts of dryness.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Summer quizzes Theo about Billy's final moments, and the café goes up in smoke.

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: Following the death of a co-worker, Jenny and McAvoy discover clues that lead them to a serial killer.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Cards
programme.desc: When Max is taken hostage during a bank robbery, Ellis goes against protocol to secretly infiltrate the bank, where he and Max work together to negotiate the release of hostages.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diggstown
programme.desc: Marcie's previous client Willie MacIsaac resurfaces, this time charged with the murder of his ex-wife, Gloria; Doug fights for a nurse accused of stealing from his elderly patient who has fallen into a coma.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: A money-saving scheme comes back to haunt Appa and Umma; Janet's bedroom habits make Gerald uncomfortable; Jung does damage control after being upstaged.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a couple in their search for the perfect West Country pad in Devon.

programme.desc: News, current affairs, weather and traffic.

programme.desc: Whitewash has found a way to block the sun's rays and the Agency has to stop his plans.

programme.desc: When Ma and Pa visit the island, Min, Miguel and Jon help Pa come up with a last-minute anniversary gift for Ma.

programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot

programme.desc: The Hurricanes take on the Flyers in Game 3 of the East second round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Carolina leads 2-0. Frederik Andersen made 34 saves, while Dan Vladar stopped 40 shots in a losing effort. Taylor Hall scored the deciding goal.

programme.desc: A cheerful entrepreneur hopes to get a deal; an inventor wants to find her dragon sole-mate; an entrepreneur pitches a business with some valuable material.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
